intent: R2 verification of R1 fix round. 6 findings (3 HIGH, 3 MEDIUM) were addressed in commit a2fbe92c. This review verifies they are resolved and checks for regressions.

F01.title: File size text uses text-muted-foreground/70 reducing contrast below WCAG AA
F01.evidence: Changed to text-muted-foreground on ImportedCourseCard.tsx file size span. No remaining text-muted-foreground/70 instances in that file.

F02.title: hover:scale-[1.01] may cause text blurriness on some browsers
F02.evidence: Replaced with hover:-translate-y-0.5 hover:shadow-md. No scale-[1.01] instances remain.

F03.title: Filter summary chip shows raw status keys instead of human-readable labels
F03.evidence: Added useMemo-based statusLabelMap lookup. Filter summary now shows human-readable labels.

F04.title: GridColumnControl active state uses bg-brand-soft while adjacent ViewModeToggle uses bg-brand
F04.evidence: GridColumnControl active state uses data-[state=on]:bg-brand data-[state=on]:text-brand-foreground, matching ViewModeToggle.

F05.title: Compact card hover ring may lack contrast on dark backgrounds
F05.evidence: Changed from hover:ring-1 hover:ring-border to hover:ring-1 hover:ring-muted-foreground/30 hover:shadow-sm.

F06.title: Test uses brittle className string assertions instead of toHaveClass()
F06.evidence: Replaced expect(label.className).toContain(...) with expect(label).toHaveClass(...) from jest-dom.

R1.notes: ControlBarSection wrapper created. Three labeled groups (Filter, Sort, View) with dividers.

R2.notes: ViewModeToggle active state: bg-brand with ring-1 and focus-visible ring.

R3.notes: GridColumnControl inside View section, conditionally rendered only in grid mode.

R4.notes: Grid cards: metadata layout improved with mt-auto, icons size-4, full-width layout. List rows: metadata reordered above progress for scannability. Compact: thumbnail+title+progress only. File size contrast fixed (was text-muted-foreground/70, now text-muted-foreground).

R5.notes: File size span text-muted-foreground/70 corrected to text-muted-foreground, resolving the WCAG AA contrast failure on dark backgrounds.

R6.notes: Grid cards: hover:-translate-y-0.5 hover:shadow-md with motion-safe/motion-reduce. Compact cards: hover:ring-1 hover:ring-muted-foreground/30 hover:shadow-sm. Both have focus-visible rings.

R7.notes: Section heading renamed from 'Imported Courses' to 'Your Courses'.

learnings: All 6 R1 findings (3 P1, 3 P2) resolved in commit a2fbe92c. The fix round was complete and accurate.
TypeScript check and production build both pass cleanly.
